name: ai_video
description: AI-generated video — director agent writes a storyboard from your prompt and references, you review and approve, then scenes are generated via Kling.

steps.description: Director skill. Orchestrates the pipeline: Phase 0 story clarification, storyboard writes, approval gate, scene-generation dispatch, failure handling.
Per styleRef (audio/video/image): Gemini extracts mood/style text. Director folds outputs into storyboard.styleAnchor.
Per imageRef: generate a reference image from the user's anchor text. Director skips entries where source != 'text' or refImages is already populated.

Per scene (post-approval only): Kling generates the clip with combined prompt + refs. Requires storyboard.styleAnchor (from analyze_style) and populated imageRefs[].refImages (from generate_ref for text-sourced refs). Director appends result to tracks[0]. May be batched (multi-shot) at director discretion — up to 6 scenes per call.

agent_notes: PIPELINE: Director-driven. Load skills/ai-video/SKILL.md — it is the contract. analyze_media, generate_image, kling_generate are the director's tools, invoked from within its flow, not separate engine-scheduled stages.

INTAKE: project.storyboard is pre-seeded by init.py (aspectRatio, targetDurationSeconds, imageRefs[], styleRefs[], scenes: []). project.tracks[0] is empty at intake and stays empty until post-approval scene generation.
APPROVAL GATE: Do not call kling_generate until storyboard.approval is set. The UI writes that field when the user clicks Approve.
TRACKS[0]: Append-only; real clips only, no stubs. Flip status to 'draft' only when every storyboard.scenes[i] has a matching clip (or batchShots entry).
